name: HRT_CONTENT_TYPES_VL
query: SELECT CT.CONTENT_TYPE_ID, CT.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, CTTL.CONTENT_TYPE_NAME, CTTL.CONTENT_DESCRIPTION, CT.CONTEXT_NAME, CT.MODULE_ID, CT.FREE_FORM_FLAG, CT.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, CT.CREATED_BY, CT.CREATION_DATE, CT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CT.LAST_UPDATED_BY, CT.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HRT_CONTENT_TYPES_B CT, HRT_CONTENT_TYPES_TL CTTL WHERE CT.CONTENT_TYPE_ID = CTTL.CONTENT_TYPE_ID AND CT.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = CTTL.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND CTTL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
